Bedan K. Muna

● Class: WEB DEVELOPER
● Status: Available FOR SYNC
Download Resume PDF

00. Professional Summary

I am a dedicated front-end development specialist and technical operations expert with a focus on Docs-as-Code architecture and cloud infrastructure automation. My expertise bridges the gap between high-performance static site generation (Astro, MkDocs, Jekyll) and robust backend monitoring within AWS environments. Based in Nairobi, I specialize in migrating legacy documentation to modern, scalable ecosystems while maintaining a focus on cross-platform compatibility and system hardening.

01. Skills

Docs_Architecture

#MkDocs #Astro Starlight #Jekyll #Docs-as-Code

Cloud_Ops

#AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) #CloudWatch #Sentry #ElasticBeanstalk

System_Engines

#Linux (Debian/Ubuntu) #Incus/LXC #Docker Compose #Proxmox

Development

#Python #JavaScript #Bash Automation #Tailwind CSS

02. Deployment History

2026 - PRESENT

IoT Systems Engineer

AquaSee

Designing and deploying a scalable IoT ecosystem for real-time water quality monitoring in sub-Saharan aquaculture. Designing low-power ESP32 firmware and a high-concurrency TIG stack telemetry pipeline, enabling industrial-grade data visualization and predictive analytics for remote farm operations.

#ESP32 #TIG Stack (InfluxDB/Grafana) #Embedded C/C++ #IoT Architecture #MQTT
2025 - 2026

Web Developer

WireMock

Led the end-to-end migration of legacy static documentation to MkDocs. Architected the navigation structure and automated content workflows to ensure image integrity and long-term maintainability for a global stakeholder base.

#MkDocs #Information Architecture #CI/CD #Static Site Migration
2024 - 2025

Application Support Specialist

Eagle Eye Software

Managed technical operations for full-stack React/Django applications on AWS. Leveraged CloudWatch and Sentry for proactive anomaly detection, root-cause analysis on ElasticBeanstalk, and RDS database health monitoring.

#AWS #CloudWatch #Sentry #ElasticBeanstalk #Python/Django
2024 - 2025

Web Developer

Lakekeeper

Established a modern Docs-as-Code ecosystem from the ground up. Developed custom themes and build scripts to ensure seamless documentation deployment across diverse developer environments.

#MkDocs #Docs-as-Code #Build Automation #Theme Development
2023 - 2023

Web Developer

Apache Iceberg

Integrated legacy design layouts into MkDocs and optimized build scripts to ensure full cross-platform compatibility between Linux and macOS environments.

#MkDocs #Shell Scripting #Cross-Platform Optimization
2023 - 2023

Web Developer

ClamXAV

Designed and implemented a multi-language documentation architecture for macOS antivirus software, streamlining global user support.

#I18n #Static Site Architecture #Technical Documentation
2023 - 2023

Web Developer

KopiCloud AD API

Built a specialized Jekyll-based documentation hub for Active Directory and DNS APIs, focusing on Terraform provider integration guides.

#Jekyll #API Documentation #Liquid Templates
